reasoning: Based on the fetch_ts_fred data up to Nov 5, 2025, cash assets dropped sharply to 2891, well below the linear trend for the year. The statistical model provides a combined estimate of P(>2891) = 0.69, indicating a strong likelihood of a near-term mean-reverting bounce. I use this as my primary anchor for the first objective. However, given the longer-term downward momentum of the series over recent months (suggesting ongoing QT effects), and following the instruction that uncertainties should increase with the forecast horizon, I regress the probability progressively towards 0.5 for the further out resolution dates.
